quote.text: Giving is living. If you stop wanting to give, there's nothing more to live for.
quote.author: Audrey Hepburn

history.text: Giving is living. If you stop wanting to give, there's nothing more to live for.
history.author: Audrey Hepburn

history.text: The purpose of life is the life of purpose.
history.author: Robin Sharma

history.text: Knowing is not enough, we must apply. Willing is not enough, we must do.
history.author: Bruce Lee

history.text: Thinking is the hardest work there is. That is why so few people engage in it.
history.author: Robert Kiyosaki

history.text: Success comes from knowing that you did your best to become the best that you are capable of becoming.
history.author: John Wooden

history.text: Nothing can dim the light which shines from within.
history.author: Maya Angelou

history.text: A creative man is motivated by the desire to achieve, not by the desire to beat others.
history.author: Ayn Rand

history.text: The most important things are the hardest to say.
history.author: Stephen King

history.text: Just do the best you can. No one can do more than that.
history.author: John Wooden

history.text: Getting over a painful experience is much like crossing monkey bars. You have to let go at some point in order to move forward.
history.author: Unknown

history.text: If you care about someone enough, you'll always be there for them no matter what.
history.author: Roy T. Bennett
